scope: binary bounded-utility hypothesis testing; no graph, real data, or held-out test data

adjacency.testing_model: fixed-size replacement of one bounded utility record

lower_bounds.nonprivate: Le Cam plus Pinsker with exact Bernoulli KL on n/chi independent blocks
lower_bounds.general_central_approximate_dp: Theorem 1 of Acharya, Sun, and Zhang (ALT 2021) after adjacency conversion
lower_bounds.ideal_secagg: inherits the general central lower bound; no stronger information-theoretic claim preregistered
lower_bounds.visible_messages: inherits the general central lower bound; sqrt(K) is mechanism-specific unless an additional communication model is proved

numerics.integer_rounding: ceiling of necessary real-valued sample count
